invariants.description: chip-supergoal plans/compiles packages but does not execute numbered implementation phases or become a production runner.
invariants.title: Planner-only boundary

invariants.description: Production execution remains upstream Hermes /goal / GoalManager; no nested /goal chain or separate production runner.
invariants.title: Standard Hermes /goal executor

invariants.description: Exactly one actual SUPERGOAL_GOAL_BODY line exists, in LAUNCH_GOAL.md only.
invariants.title: Single launch surface

invariants.description: SUPERGOAL_PHASE_DONE is a checkpoint; executor continues until audit, real blocker, or terminal completion.
invariants.title: No courtesy stop at phase boundary

invariants.description: SUPERGOAL_RUN_COMPLETE is valid only after AUDIT_COMPLETE and terminal audit evidence.
invariants.title: Completion requires audit first

invariants.description: RPD findings must mutate artifacts/work or become checked-holds with evidence tier.
invariants.title: RPD is a mutation gate

invariants.description: Review/final file delivery gates close only with strict receipt, matching target/files/hashes, and transport ack.
invariants.title: Requested delivery requires verifiable receipt

invariants.description: Resume uses package state on disk bound to goal ID and contract digest, not chat memory.
invariants.title: Resume from disk-bound identity

invariants.description: Local tests, private proof actions, read-only inspections, and requested repo cleanup continue unless a real approval gate is present.
invariants.title: Routine private/read-only checks are not fake approvals

invariants.description: Incident history maps to canonical references, invariant IDs, and regression tests instead of bloating SKILL.md.
invariants.title: Reference corpus is cataloged, not root bloat

invariants.description: Malformed phase/loop fixtures such as Phase 99 of 1, RPD mismatch, one-word loop, cycles, and placeholder commands are rejected by strict v3 validation.
invariants.title: Semantic validators reject known malformed packages

invariants.description: Packaging rejects symlinks, special files, path traversal, and implicit files outside allowlist.
invariants.title: Final archive cannot escape package root

invariants.description: Research-required contracts cannot compile or validate as strict packages until the research provider gate is satisfied with provider, source, summary, and planning implications evidence; Perplex is preferred unless unavailable.
invariants.title: Perplex-first research gate
